final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-children-book
Asset type: children's picture book spread, age 3-8
Primary request: a cute red panda wearing round glasses and blue striped overalls reading in a cozy treehouse library
Scene/backdrop: warm treehouse library interior, round window showing golden autumn forest outside, wooden bookshelves filled with colorful books
Subject: red panda with round glasses, blue striped overalls, sitting on a beanbag chair holding a large open book; squirrel organizing books on shelf; bunny napping in corner
Style/medium: children's picture book illustration, cute and whimsical, rounded smooth lines, bright saturated colors, warm and cozy
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level perspective, showing the cozy interior scene with multiple characters
Lighting/mood: warm sunlight streaming through round window, creating soft light spots on book pages, cozy and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: warm golden yellows, bright saturated colors for books, soft browns for treehouse, blue overalls accent
Materials/textures: soft rounded illustration style, smooth digital painting, no harsh edges
Constraints: keep all three animals (red panda, squirrel, bunny) in scene, maintain warm autumn forest visible through window, include hot cocoa and cookies beside the beanbag
Avoid: realistic fur texture, dark shadows, scary elements, cluttered composition, adult-oriented details
